commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=b0c8639eaaf7e1cee22a6cb51e1d31cebd180191)
commands.review_summary:
This PR adds a `pnpm test:restart:gateway` package script, a new repeated Gateway restart benchmark CLI, and focused tests for its parsing, fixture, trace, and probe helpers.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: source inspection shows the probe loop can stop on `hasRestartReadySignal` before taking a final HTTP recovery sample. I did not execute the benchmark because this was a read-only checkout review.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor real behavior proof and a probe-loop fix before merge; ClawSweeper should not auto-repair while the external-PR proof gate is unmet.

target.title: [Test] Add gateway restart benchmark tooling
target.body:
## Summary

- Problem: Gateway restart regressions were hard to compare because there was no repeatable local restart benchmark.
- Why it matters: Restart readiness, post-ready sidecars, failure rate, and resource slope need machine-readable evidence before optimization claims are useful.
- What changed: Added `scripts/bench-gateway-restart.ts`, `pnpm test:restart:gateway`, and tests for CLI parsing, trace parsing, restart intent writing, ACPX probe cases, and no-unavailable-window restart probes.
- What did NOT change (scope boundary): This PR adds tooling only. It does not change Gateway startup/runtime behavior.
- AI-assisted: Yes.

## Change Type (select all)

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor required for the fix
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Security hardening
- [x] Chore/infra

## Scope (select all touched areas)

- [x] Gateway / orchestration
- [ ] Skills / tool execution
- [ ] Auth / tokens
- [ ] Memory / storage
- [ ] Integrations
- [ ] API / contracts
- [ ] UI / DX
- [x] CI/CD / infra

## Linked Issue/PR

- Related: #82396
- Related: #82603
- [ ] This PR fixes a bug or regression

## Real behavior proof (required for external PRs)

- Behavior or issue addressed: Adds a runnable Gateway restart benchmark CLI that reports readiness timing, restart traces, failure codes, resource slopes, and ACPX startup probe comparison cases.
- Real environment tested: Local macOS/Darwin arm64 checkout, Node v25.9.0.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node --import tsx scripts/bench-gateway-restart.ts --help`
- Evidence after fix (screenshot, recording, terminal capture, console output, redacted runtime log, linked artifact, or copied live output): The command printed the benchmark usage and case ids, including `skipChannels`, `skipChannelsAcpxProbe`, `skipChannelsNoAcpxProbe`, `default`, and `fiftyPlugins`.
- Observed result after fix: The new CLI is loadable from the checkout and exposes the intended restart benchmark cases and options.
- What was not tested: A full real Gateway benchmark run was not rerun on this split branch because `dist/entry.js` is not built in this worktree. The full benchmark was run on the combined local change set before splitting.
- Before evidence (optional but encouraged): Before this PR there was no `test:restart:gateway` script or repeated restart benchmark entrypoint.

## Root Cause (if applicable)

- Root cause: N/A.
- Missing detection / guardrail: Restart timing evidence depended on ad hoc runs rather than a checked-in benchmark harness.
- Contributing context (if known): Gateway restart instrumentation recently landed, but repeatable restart comparison tooling was still missing.

## Regression Test Plan (if applicable)

- Coverage level that should have caught this:
  - [x] Unit test
  - [ ] Seam / integration test
  - [ ] End-to-end test
  - [ ] Existing coverage already sufficient
- Target test or file: `test/scripts/bench-gateway-restart.test.ts`
- Scenario the test should lock in: CLI parsing, benchmark case selection, trace metric parsing, restart intent creation, and fast restart probes without an unavailable window.
- Why this is the smallest reliable guardrail: The benchmark is a script surface, so focused script tests catch regressions without launching the full Gateway.
- Existing test that already covers this (if any): None.
- If no new test is added, why not: N/A.

## User-visible / Behavior Changes

Adds a developer-facing `pnpm test:restart:gateway` benchmark command. No runtime user behavior changes.

## Diagram (if applicable)

```text
Before:
manual restart investigation -> ad hoc timing notes

After:
pnpm test:restart:gateway -> repeated restarts -> JSON + summary metrics
```

## Security Impact (required)

- New permissions/capabilities? (`Yes/No`) No
- Secrets/tokens handling changed? (`Yes/No`) No
- New/changed network calls? (`Yes/No`) No
- Command/tool execution surface changed? (`Yes/No`) Yes
- Data access scope changed? (`Yes/No`) No
- If any `Yes`, explain risk + mitigation: The new command is a local developer benchmark that spawns the local Gateway entrypoint with generated temp config and `--auth none`; it does not run automatically.

## Repro + Verification

### Environment

- OS: Darwin arm64
- Runtime/container: Local Node v25.9.0 checkout
- Model/provider: N/A
- Integration/channel (if any): Gateway local process only
- Relevant config (redacted): Generated temporary benchmark config

### Steps

1. Run `node --import tsx scripts/bench-gateway-restart.ts --help`.
2. Run `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/bench-gateway-restart.test.ts`.
3. Run targeted TS and diff checks listed below.

### Expected

- The CLI loads and prints benchmark options/cases.
- Script tests pass.

### Actual

- CLI help printed successfully.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/bench-gateway-restart.test.ts` passed, 9 tests.

## Evidence

Attach at least one:

- [ ] Failing test/log before + passing after
- [x] Trace/log snippets
- [ ] Screenshot/recording
- [ ] Perf numbers (if relevant)

## Human Verification (required)

What you personally verified (not just CI), and how:

- Verified scenarios: CLI help output, script unit coverage, TS wrapper check, formatting, and whitespace check.
- Edge cases checked: no-unavailable-window restart probe completes without waiting for the process deadline.
- What you did **not** verify: Full real Gateway benchmark execution on this split branch.

Verification commands:

- `node --import tsx scripts/bench-gateway-restart.ts --help`: passed
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/bench-gateway-restart.test.ts`: passed, 9 tests
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --write scripts/bench-gateway-restart.ts test/scripts/bench-gateway-restart.test.ts`: passed
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs --ignoreConfig --noEmit --allowImportingTsExtensions --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --target ES2023 --types node --lib ES2023,DOM scripts/bench-gateway-restart.ts test/scripts/bench-gateway-restart.test.ts`: passed
- `git diff --check HEAD~1..HEAD`: passed
- `codex review --base main`: attempted locally but tool-blocked; no clean Codex review verdict was produced.

## Review Conversations

- [x] I replied to or resolved every bot review conversation I addressed in this PR.
- [x] I left unresolved only the conversations that still need reviewer or maintainer judgment.

No existing PR review conversations were addressed by this PR.

## Compatibility / Migration

- Backward compatible? (`Yes/No`) Yes
- Config/env changes? (`Yes/No`) No
- Migration needed? (`Yes/No`) No
- If yes, exact upgrade steps: N/A

## Risks and Mitigations

- Risk: The benchmark script is large for a tooling PR.
  - Mitigation: It is isolated under `scripts/`, has focused tests, and does not run automatically.
target.author: samzong

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
